title: Simple Timer/Stopwatch
description: A minimalist, vanilla-style HUD timer and stopwatch that lives right above your XP bar.
body:
⏱️ Simple Timer & Stopwatch
A minimalist, vanilla-style HUD timer and stopwatch for Fabric.

Simple Timer & Stopwatch is a lightweight, client-side modification designed for players who need to track time without leaving the game or relying on clunky external apps. Whether you are timing a farm's efficiency, tracking your speedrunning splits, or just setting a reminder for a real-life task, this mod provides a clean and non-intrusive solution.

✨ Key Features
Integrated HUD Display: A high-visibility green timer appears right above your health and hunger bars. It is designed to look like a natural part of the Minecraft UI.
Dual Mode Functionality: Works as both a countdown timer and a count-up stopwatch.
Zero Infrastructure: No config files, no heavy dependencies, and no complex menus. Everything is controlled via intuitive chat commands.
Client-Side Only: You don't need the mod installed on the server to use it—perfect for playing on your favorite multiplayer servers!

🛠️ How to Use (Commands)
The mod is entirely command-driven for maximum speed and simplicity.

1. Countdown Timer
Set a timer for a specific duration.

/starttimer <time>
Examples: /starttimer 10s, /starttimer 5m, /starttimer 1h30m
The timer will count down to zero and then disappear automatically.
2. Stopwatch
Track how much time has passed since you started an activity.

/stopwatch start – Begins counting up from zero.
/stopwatch stop – Ends the session and displays your final lap time in the chat for your records.

🚀 Technical Requirements
Mod Loader: Fabric
Minecraft Version: 1.21.10
Dependencies: Requires Fabric API

📋 Installation Guide
Ensure you have the Fabric Loader installed.
Download the Fabric API and place it in your mods folder.
Download Simple Timer & Stopwatch and place it in your mods folder.
Launch the game and start timing!
